qa_scope: strict whole-artifact review for the generated portrait plus diagnostic review for the exact saved control-map branch

pixel_comparison.interpretation: ComfyUI re-saved white edge pixels as 254 instead of 255; black pixels and geometry stayed aligned, so this verifies the diagnostic branch saved the loaded control map content.

visual_findings: High-contrast white-edge-on-black control map is present and legible.
Face, hair, shoulder, jacket, collar, jaw, and neck contours are visible.
No color contamination, unrelated image content, or RGB placeholder artifact is visible.
The map remains visually suitable as a QA diagnostic for the active Canny input.

whole_image_findings.face_realism: pass; face structure is coherent and proportional with no obvious warping.
whole_image_findings.eyes: pass_with_notes; both eyes are readable with natural catchlights, though the overall eye area remains slightly low-key.
whole_image_findings.skin_texture: pass_with_notes; pores and microtexture are visible, but the finish is still somewhat polished.
whole_image_findings.hair: pass; hairline and volume are natural with no severe edge artifacts.
whole_image_findings.mouth_teeth: pass; closed mouth is natural and no teeth artifacts are present.
whole_image_findings.body_proportions: pass; shoulders, neck, jawline, and collar relation are coherent.
whole_image_findings.clothing_fabric: pass; blazer and shirt are clothed and plausible, with improved collar boundary readability.
whole_image_findings.lighting_background: pass; soft neutral studio background and balanced cinematic exposure are coherent.
whole_image_findings.control_map_adherence: pass; silhouette, head pose, hair mass, jaw, neck, and shoulder lines follow the diagnostic control map without harsh outline contamination.
whole_image_findings.generation_artifacts: pass_with_notes; no severe artifacts, but local-only polish/smoothness note remains.

improvement_verified.workflow_change: Added SaveImage node 13 from LoadImage node 11 so the exact Canny control map loaded by the workflow is saved beside the generated portrait.
improvement_verified.request_change: Updated expected_outputs.minimum_output_count to 2 and added diagnostic_output_prefix for the control-map diagnostic artifact.

remaining_risks: This is local ComfyUI evidence only and does not certify target-runtime EC2 behavior for the changed v6 request.
The generated portrait is a single local smoke artifact, not broad multi-seed quality certification.
The portrait still carries minor local QA notes for low-key eye shadows and slightly polished skin.
next_action: Keep EC2 stopped unless target-runtime proof is intentionally selected; otherwise continue local-first with another named workflow diagnostic, pose/depth lane, or QA-driven control strategy.
